title: pUC19 diagnostic digest gel distinguishes insert orientation
objective: Import empty, forward, and reverse pUC19 diagnostic constructs; simulate HindIII+XhoI digests; render one multi-lane gel artifact.
constraints: Call validate_workspace with checkSequenceDigests=true after edit_sequence.
Do not infer amino-acid consequences from edit_sequence alone.

inputs.source: Generated from authentic pUC19 plus fixtures/fasta/datalox_insert_v1.fa in forward orientation.
Generated from authentic pUC19 plus reverse-complemented fixtures/fasta/datalox_insert_v1.fa.

toolPlan.purpose: Import task input into a fresh workspace.
Verify workspace JSON and stored sequence digest consistency.

caveats: Forward and reverse construct inputs are deterministic task fixtures generated from authentic pUC19 plus fixtures/fasta/datalox_insert_v1.fa.
